gtcsolo.machine.conversion_fluid_hatch.d: Accepts Mekanism Gas/Infusion and converts to GT fluid
gtcsolo.machine.conversion_fluid_output_: Converts GT fluid to Mekanism Gas/Infusion and outputs
gtceu.machine.fec.name: Fantasy Element Constructor
gtceu.machine.fantasia_forge.name: Fantasia Forge
gtceu.machine.spaceforge.name: Space Forge
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.1: §bAdvanced Fusion§r forging apparatus, discovered from the relics of an unknown civilization
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.2: Using fusion beyond known chemistry, this machine forges
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.3: §6cosmic elements§r that would only form in space environments. An extraordinarily advanced machine
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.4: §e[States]§r Multiple states transition in order and conditions. Initial state: PREPARING
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.6: §e[Temperature]§r Consumes EU from energy hatches, converted at 10 EU = 1 F.
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.7: Max is 100M F; on reaching it, transitions to §aOPERATING§r state
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.8: Heat is generated via resonance through coils, so coil performance matters.
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.9: Insufficient coil performance exceeds the heat tolerance, causing rapid damage increase.
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.10: Conversely, sufficient coil performance makes EU→heat conversion more efficient. Max 4x efficiency
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.11: §e[Damage]§r At max temp, recipe operation begins. Normal recipes run.
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.12: However, 50%% chance per second §edamage§r rises +0.3%%. On recipe success: 50%% chance +1%%
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.13: Resonance heat averages around 4000F, significantly lower than the main body temperature.
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.14: §e[Repair]§r When §edamage§r reaches 100%%, recipes are rejected and machine enters REPAIRING state.
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.15: In REPAIRING, §edamage§r recovers 1%%/sec. On reaching 0%%, the §7machine stops§r
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.17: §e[Normal Energy Hatch]§r Structure only valid with 3 tiers below SEHatch (UV→IV etc)
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.18: §e[OC]§r SEHatch tier is the base voltage; standard OC is allowed up to this tier.
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.desc.19: Beyond that, imperfect OC applies, reducing effect to half of normal
gtcsolo.machine.spaceforge.coil_warning: §c§lWARNING: Coil cannot handle resonance heat! Damage x20§r
gtcsolo.machine.sehatch.desc.3: Normal energy hatches are forced to Tier §b%s§r
gtcsolo.machine.sehatch.desc.4: During recipe operation, EU is consumed only from this hatch
gtcsolo.machine.sehatch.desc.5: Standard OC up to this hatch's tier, imperfect OC (x0.75) beyond
gtcsolo.machine.sehatch.desc.6: Parallel count is granted based on this hatch's performance.
gtcsolo.machine.sehatch.desc.7: That value scales exponentially with voltage.
gtcsolo.machine.fec.desc.1: An advanced, fantastical machine that constructs exotic metals through layered narratives
gtcsolo.machine.fec.desc.2: Operates on a unique machine logic distinct from standard GregTech
gtcsolo.machine.fec.desc.3: Normally limited to imperfect §6OC§r. However, if the fluid hatches contain
gtcsolo.machine.fec.desc.4: 2000mb or more of plasma when a recipe starts, it is absorbed and consumed during operation
gtcsolo.machine.fec.desc.5: Whether plasma has been absorbed can be checked in the UI
gtcsolo.machine.fec.desc.6: Each plasma type stored converts one imperfect §6OC§r into a §bperfect §6OC§r
gtceu.machine.collapsed_chamber.name: Collapsed Chamber
gtcsolo.machine.cc.desc.1: A high-pressure crushing multiblock with perfect overclocking
gtcsolo.machine.cc.desc.2: Counts EV energy input hatches; consumes Air from fluid hatches once per MC day
gtcsolo.machine.cc.desc.3: Per EV hatch: 100,000mb Air consumed; parallels = 2^(units consumed)
gtcsolo.machine.cc.desc.4: Supports up to 17 fluid input hatches
block.gtcsolo.r_hicc_glass.tooltip.1: Resistant to heat, shock, cold, and chemicals
gtcsolo.wen_energy_card.unlinked: §7Unlinked §8(shift-rightclick a WEN Data Monitor to bind)§r
gtcsolo.wen_energy_card.desc.1: Install into an AE2 machine's upgrade slot.
gtcsolo.wen_energy_card.desc.2: The entire AE2 network receives unlimited power from the linked WEN network (2 AE = 1 EU).
gtcsolo.machine.hpabf.desc.1: §bMultiblock Performance:§r Coil-based heat control; the coil's EU consumption discount applies.
gtcsolo.machine.hpabf.desc.2: §e[Power Resistance]§r Due to the massive coils' resistance, OC cannot be performed normally — only imperfect OCs occur (§c×0.65§r per step).
gtcsolo.machine.hpabf.desc.3: §e[Heat Rise]§r To run a recipe, the machine first generates the recipe's required heat via power. Each OC step raises the temperature by §b(T+100K) × 1.3§r (cumulative — +100K added before each multiplication).
gtcsolo.machine.hpabf.desc.4: §e[Promotion]§r For every §b1000K§r the temperature exceeds the recipe's requirement, one imperfect OC is converted into one §aperfect OC§r (×0.25).
gtcsolo.machine.hpabf.desc.5: §e[Temperature Bonus]§r When the actual heat is §btwice or more§r the recipe's required heat, separately from OC the recipe duration is reduced to §a80%%§r of original.
gtcsolo.machine.hpabf.desc.6: §e[Coil Cap]§r Since heat is coil-controlled, it is subject to the coil's temperature limit.
gtcsolo.machine.hpabf.desc.7: §6Structural boost:§r Proper heat treatment and robust construction raise the coil's effective heat limit to §b150%%§r of normal.
gtcsolo.multiblock.error.exclusive_parts: Part is already claimed by another multiblock
gtceu.machine.mekanism_infuser.name: Mekanism Infuser
gtceu.machine.micro_planet_miner.name: Micro Planet Miner
Windows accept fluid/chemical/item/energy hatches on the casing frame
gtcsolo.machine.mekanism_infuser.desc.1: Large multiblock for crafting §dMekanism tiered alloys§r (Infused → Hypercharged)
gtcsolo.machine.mekanism_infuser.desc.2: §bIndustrial OC§r enabled. Functional enhancements possible via §bUpgrade Hatches§r.
gtcsolo.machine.mekanism_infuser.desc.3: §e[Industrial OC]§r An OC evolved for mass production. Unlike normal OC, recipe duration is barely reduced — only energy consumption scales. However, inputs and outputs double per OC step.
gtcsolo.machine.mekanism_infuser.desc.4: §e[Functional Upgrade: Recipe Efficiency]§r Multiblock performance can be boosted via Upgrade Hatches. In this machine, recipes will run more efficiently.
gtcsolo.machine.mekanism_infuser.desc.5: A bridge multiblock to technologies beyond what vanilla GregTech can handle.
gtceu.machine.upgrade_hatch_tier_1.name: Upgrade Hatch (Tier 1)
gtceu.machine.upgrade_hatch_tier_2.name: Upgrade Hatch (Tier 2)
gtceu.machine.upgrade_hatch_tier_3.name: Upgrade Hatch (Tier 3)
gtceu.machine.upgrade_hatch_tier_4.name: Upgrade Hatch (Tier 4)
gtcsolo.machine.upgrade_hatch.desc.2: §8Tier %s — %s slots. No effect by itself; the multiblock reads it.§r
gtcsolo.machine.wmf.desc.2: §e[Industrial OC]§r Each OC step: §bduration ×0.9§r, §bEUt ×4§r, §binputs/outputs ×2§r. OC is barely any faster, but the batch size doubles per step.
gtcsolo.machine.wmf.desc.3: §cParallel Hatches are not supported§r — Industrial OC replaces parallelization.
gtcsolo.machine.wmf.desc.4: §7Parts (hatches/buses) are exclusive to this multiblock and cannot be shared with others.§r
gtcsolo.machine.mpf.desc.1: §bIndustrial-scale material pressing§r multiblock for §eBender§r, §eCompressor§r, §eForge Hammer§r, and §eForming Press§r recipes.
gtcsolo.machine.mpf.desc.2: §e[Industrial OC]§r Each OC step: §bduration ×0.9§r, §bEUt ×4§r, §binputs/outputs ×2§r. OC is barely any faster, but the batch size doubles per step.
gtcsolo.machine.mpf.desc.3: §cParallel Hatches are not supported§r — Industrial OC replaces parallelization.
gtcsolo.machine.mpf.desc.4: §7Parts (hatches/buses) are exclusive to this multiblock and cannot be shared with others.§r
gtcsolo.machine.chemical_hatch.desc.io.i: §aInput§r — feeds chemical into the multiblock from Mek pipes
gtcsolo.machine.chemical_hatch.desc.io.o: §cOutput§r — pushes chemical to adjacent Mek pipes/tanks
gtcsolo.machine.universal_hatch.desc.exc: §eExclusive§r — holds fluid §lOR§r gas, not both; empty one side to switch
gtceu.machine.wen_main_storage.name: WEN Main Storage
gtcsolo.machine.wen.desc.1: Wireless Energy Network central storage multiblock
gtcsolo.machine.wen.desc.2: Variable size (3x3x3 to 15x15x15), fill interior with Energy Cells
gtcsolo.machine.wen.desc.3: Assign a network ID to link with wireless hatches
gtcsolo.machine.wen_wireless_input.desc2: Receives EU and transfers to linked WEN storage
gui.gtcsolo.wen_input.no_local_networks: No WEN networks in this dimension
gtcsolo.machine.wen_wireless_output.desc: Withdraws EU from linked WEN storage and outputs to cables
gtcsolo.machine.wen_energy_hatch.desc2: Multiblock energy hatch powered by WEN storage
Multiblock dynamo hatch that sends generated EU to WEN storage
gtcsolo.machine.eebf.desc.2: Runs standard EBF recipes with coil-based overclocking
gtcsolo.machine.eebf.desc.3: Supports up to 2 energy input hatches
gtcsolo.machine.ccg.desc.1: A multiblock generator that produces energy through chemical combustion
gtcsolo.machine.ccg.desc.2: Consumes reactive fluids and outputs byproducts with energy
enchantment.gtcsolo.absolute_kill.desc: Guarantees the death of any entity upon hit
